vocab.example: 奶奶在花园里种了很多黄瓜。
今晚我们有个同学聚会。
他高兴得像个孩子似的。
请用剪刀把这张纸剪开。
他的身份依然是个秘密。
这块饼干的形状很特别。
汤里加点调味料会更好喝。
我亲手做了一张贺卡送给老师。
朋友难过时，我们要去安慰他。
屋子里陷入了一片沉默。
大家异口同声地回答了老师的问题。
长时间的工作让他感到非常劳累。
承认错误是勇敢的表现。
我们已经准备好了手工材料。

sentences.text: 同学们抬起了头，七嘴八舌地说了起来。
他们俩同时萌生了一个坏主意。
sentences.description: Two people coming up with a bad idea together.

sentences.text: 我心里有了决定后，就像一支离了弦的箭一样，拼命地跑向学校。
segments: 像一支离了弦的箭一样
sentences.description: Running towards school as fast as an arrow.

sentences.text: 老师看见我气喘吁吁的样子，就问我发生了什么事。
sentences.description: Teacher asking what happened as I arrived out of breath.

sentences.text: 小乐见状，一时惊呆了，张开了嘴巴，半天没合拢。

黄瓜.zh: 妈妈买了新鲜的黄瓜做凉拌菜。
黄瓜.en: Mom bought fresh cucumbers to make cold dishes.

黄瓜.zh: 这里的黄瓜吃起来非常脆甜。
黄瓜.en: The cucumbers here taste very crisp and sweet.

黄瓜.zh: 菜园里架子上挂满了绿色的黄瓜。
黄瓜.en: The trellises in the vegetable garden are hung full of green cucumbers.

黄瓜.zh: 切片黄瓜可以用来敷脸美容。
黄瓜.en: Sliced cucumbers can be used on the face for beauty care.

黄瓜.zh: 晚餐我们吃黄瓜炒鸡蛋。
黄瓜.en: We had scrambled eggs with cucumbers for dinner.

聚会.zh: 周末我们要举办一次同学聚会。
聚会.en: We are going to hold a class reunion this weekend.

聚会.zh: 大家在聚会上开心地聊天唱歌。
聚会.en: Everyone chatted and sang happily at the gathering.

聚会.zh: 这是难得的大聚会，大家都出席了。
聚会.en: This is a rare grand gathering where everyone showed up.

聚会.zh: 家庭聚会总是充满了温馨和欢笑。
聚会.en: Family gatherings are always filled with warmth and laughter.

聚会.zh: 我收到了参加朋友生日聚会的邀请。
聚会.en: I received an invitation to attend a friend's birthday party.

似的.zh: 他跑得飞快，像一阵风似的。
似的.en: He ran exceptionally fast, like a gust of wind.

似的.zh: 妹妹笑得很甜，像小天使似的。
似的.en: Younger sister smiles very sweetly, like a little angel.

似的.zh: 听到这个消息，他高兴得像过年似的。
似的.en: Hearing this news, he was as happy as if celebrating New Year's.

似的.zh: 天空阴沉沉的，好像要下雨似的。
似的.en: The sky is gloomy, as though it is about to rain.

似的.zh: 他站在那里一动不动，像木头人似的。
似的.en: He stood there without moving, just like a wooden mannequin.

剪.zh: 请用剪刀把这张纸剪成两半。
剪.en: Please use scissors to cut this paper into two halves.

剪.zh: 哥哥昨天去理发店剪了头发。
剪.en: My elder brother went to the barbershop to get his hair cut yesterday.

剪.zh: 妈妈正在用布料剪裁一件新衣服。
剪.en: Mom is cutting fabric to tailor a new piece of clothing.

剪.zh: 他把花园里的杂草剪干净了。
剪.en: He cut away all the weeds in the garden clean.

剪.zh: 小朋友们手巧地剪出了许多窗花。
剪.en: The children skillfully cut out many paper window decorations.

紫菜.zh: 妈妈做了一碗热腾腾的紫菜蛋花汤。
紫菜.en: Mom made a bowl of hot seaweed egg drop soup.

紫菜.zh: 包寿司需要用到新鲜的紫菜片。
紫菜.en: Making sushi requires using fresh sheets of seaweed.

紫菜.zh: 紫菜富含丰富的矿物质和营养。
紫菜.en: Seaweed is rich in minerals and nutrients.

紫菜.zh: 我喜欢吃香脆的烤紫菜零食。
紫菜.en: I like eating crispy roasted seaweed snacks.

紫菜.zh: 水煮开后加入紫菜调味即可。
紫菜.en: After the water boils, add seaweed and seasoning to finish.

祝福.zh: 在生日会上，大家为他送上祝福。
祝福.en: At the birthday party, everyone sent blessings to him.

祝福.zh: 新年到了，祝愿你幸福快乐，送上我诚挚的祝福。
祝福.en: New Year is here; I wish you happiness and joy, sending my sincere blessings.

祝福.zh: 老师在毕业赠言里写满了对大家的祝福。
祝福.en: The teacher's graduation message was filled with blessings for everyone.

祝福.zh: 让我们共同祝福祖国繁荣昌盛。
祝福.en: Let us together wish prosperity and flourishing for our motherland.

祝福.zh: 贺卡上写着满满的祝福语。
祝福.en: The greeting card is written with full blessing words.

身份.zh: 入场前请出示您的身份证明。
身份.en: Please present your identification proof before entry.

身份.zh: 他以代表的身份参加了这次重要活动。
身份.en: He attended this important event in the capacity of a representative.

身份.zh: 保护个人身份信息不被泄露非常关键。
身份.en: Protecting personal identity information from being leaked is crucial.

身份.zh: 无论身处什么身份，都要认真尽责。
身份.en: Regardless of status or identity, one must act responsibly and diligently.

身份.zh: 警察确认了受害者身份。
身份.en: The police confirmed the victim's identity.

炒.zh: 厨师正在锅里炒着可口的菜肴。
炒.en: The chef is stir-frying delicious dishes in the wok.

炒.zh: 今晚我们吃炒米饭和炒白菜。
炒.en: Tonight we are eating fried rice and stir-fried cabbage.

炒.zh: 大火快炒可以保持蔬菜的鲜嫩。
炒.en: High-heat quick stir-frying retains the fresh tenderness of vegetables.

炒.zh: 妈妈教我如何炒好一道家常菜。
炒.en: Mom taught me how to stir-fry a home-style dish well.

炒.zh: 厨房里传来了炒菜的声音和香味。
炒.en: Sounds and scents of stir-frying dishes came from the kitchen.

形状.zh: 天晚上的云彩呈现出各种奇怪的形状。
形状.en: The evening clouds displayed various strange shapes.

形状.zh: 饼干被做成了可爱的动物形状。
形状.en: The cookies were made into cute animal shapes.

形状.zh: 请指出这个几何图形的形状。
形状.en: Please point out the shape of this geometric figure.

形状.zh: 树叶的形状随季节发生着变化。
形状.en: The shape of leaves changes with the seasons.

形状.zh: 水本身没有固定形状，随容器改变。
形状.en: Water itself has no fixed shape and changes with its container.

调味料.zh: 做菜时加入适当的调味料会更美味。
调味料.en: Adding appropriate seasonings when cooking will make food tastier.

调味料.zh: 厨房里的调味料盒装满了盐和糖。
调味料.en: The seasoning container in the kitchen is filled with salt and sugar.

调味料.zh: 健康饮食应该减少过多的调味料。
调味料.en: A healthy diet should reduce excessive seasonings.

调味料.zh: 这种调味料能提升汤汁的鲜味。
调味料.en: This seasoning can enhance the savory flavor of broth.

调味料.zh: 架子上摆放着各种各样的调味料瓶。
调味料.en: Various condiment bottles are placed on the shelf.

贺卡.zh: 教师节那天，我们给老师亲手制作了贺卡。
贺卡.en: On Teachers' Day, we made handmade greeting cards for our teachers.

贺卡.zh: 我在贺卡上写下了真诚的祝福。
贺卡.en: I wrote sincere blessings on the greeting card.

贺卡.zh: 打开这张贺卡，里面会发出优美的音乐。
贺卡.en: Opening this greeting card, sweet music plays inside.

贺卡.zh: 收到远方朋友寄来的贺卡让我很惊喜。
贺卡.en: Receiving a greeting card mailed by a friend from afar pleasantly surprised me.

贺卡.zh: 妹妹用彩纸和丝带装饰贺卡。
贺卡.en: Younger sister decorates the greeting card with colored paper and ribbons.

安慰.zh: 看到朋友伤心，他连忙上前安慰。
安慰.en: Seeing his friend sad, he promptly stepped forward to comfort him.

安慰.zh: 妈妈温和的话语给了我极大的安慰。
安慰.en: Mom's gentle words gave me immense comfort.

安慰.zh: 输了比赛不要紧，大家互相安慰鼓励。
安慰.en: Losing the game doesn't matter; everyone comforted and encouraged each other.

安慰.zh: 无论怎么安慰，她依然止不住流泪。
安慰.en: No matter how she was comforted, she still couldn't stop crying.

安慰.zh: 一句关切问候就是最好的安慰。
安慰.en: A caring greeting is the best comfort.

沉默.zh: 面对提问，他选择了保持沉默。
沉默.en: Facing the question, he chose to remain silent.

沉默.zh: 房间里一片沉默，没人开口讲话。
沉默.en: Complete silence filled the room; no one spoke.

沉默.zh: 经过长久的沉默后，他终于说出了真相。
沉默.en: After a long silence, he finally spoke the truth.
Silence does not represent admitting error.

沉默.zh: 老师的严肃语气让全班瞬间沉默下来。
沉默.en: The teacher's strict tone instantly silenced the whole class.

异口同声.zh: 同学们异口同声地回答："知道了！"
看到奇观，大家异口同声地发出赞叹。
异口同声.en: Seeing the marvel, everyone offered praise in unison.

异口同声.zh: 大家异口同声地推选他担任队长。
异口同声.en: Everyone voted in unison to elect him as captain.

异口同声.zh: 当被问及愿不愿意时，他们异口同声地喊愿意。
异口同声.en: When asked if willing, they shouted willing with one voice.

异口同声.zh: 听到这个好消息，全家异口同声地欢呼起来。
异口同声.en: Hearing this good news, the whole family cheered in unison.

烦恼.zh: 遇到了烦恼可以找父母或朋友倾诉。
烦恼.en: When encountering troubles, you can confide in parents or friends.

烦恼.zh: 别为还没发生的事情感到烦恼。
烦恼.en: Don't feel worried over things that haven't happened yet.

烦恼.zh: 听音乐能帮我化解心中的烦恼。
烦恼.en: Listening to music helps resolve the worries in my heart.

烦恼.zh: 成长的过程中总会伴随着各种烦恼。
烦恼.en: Growing up is always accompanied by various troubles.

烦恼.zh: 解决了这个大难题，烦恼一扫而空。
烦恼.en: Having solved this huge problem, worries were completely swept away.

劳累.zh: 经过一整天辛苦的工作，爸爸显得非常劳累。
劳累.en: After a whole day of hard work, Dad appeared extremely tired.

劳累.zh: 身体长期过度劳累容易生病。
劳累.en: Long-term excessive overwork of the body easily causes illness.

劳累.zh: 妈妈为了照顾生病的我，劳累得瘦了。
劳累.en: Mom grew thin from fatigue taking care of me while I was sick.

劳累.zh: 适度休息可以消除劳累。
尽管感到劳累，看到成果大家依然很高兴。
劳累.en: Although feeling tired, everyone was still very happy seeing the results.

错误.zh: 犯了错误就要勇敢地承认并改正。
错误.en: If you make a mistake, acknowledge and correct it bravely.

错误.zh: 这篇文章里有几处明显的拼写错误。
错误.en: There are several obvious spelling errors in this article.

错误.zh: 吸取错误的教训能让我们不断进步。
错误.en: Drawing lessons from mistakes allows us to make continuous progress.

错误.zh: 老师细心地帮我指出了作业中的错误。
错误.en: The teacher carefully pointed out errors in my homework for me.

错误.zh: 不要因为害怕犯错误而不敢尝试。
错误.en: Do not fear trying simply because you are afraid of making mistakes.

材料.zh: 我们需要准备好手工课所需的材料。
材料.en: We need to prepare materials required for the craft class.

材料.zh: 这座建筑采用了新型环保材料。
材料.en: This building used new types of eco-friendly materials.

材料.zh: 写文章前要收集充分的资料和材料。
材料.en: Gather ample info and materials before writing an essay.

材料.zh: 这种材料非常坚固且重量轻。
材料.en: This material is very sturdy and light in weight.

材料.zh: 把所有材料混合在一起搅拌均匀。
材料.en: Mix and stir all materials together evenly.
